LanguageData.FB_DevourerGestation.label: devourer gestation
LanguageData.FB_DevourerGestation.description: Teach the colony brain to grow a slow armored devourer that swallows enemies and digests them into hemogel.
LanguageData.FB_DevourerGestation.generalRules.rulesS: subject_story->grew armored stomach-beasts for battlefield capture
subject_story->turned swallowed prey into hemogel reserves
